articles.title: US court allows public schools to display Ten Commandments
articles.excerpt:
A US appeals court ruled Texas can require the Ten Commandments in schools, a major decision on the separation of church and state in public education.

Read More: https://punchng.com/us-court-allows-public-schools-to-display-ten-commandments/

articles.title: Finland Jobless Rate Rises Again as War in Iran Slows Recovery
articles.excerpt: Finland’s unemployment rate rose to the highest level in more than a decade, just as the war in Iran adds to the gloom in the Nordic nation.
articles.content:
(Bloomberg) Finlands unemployment rate rose to the highest level in more than a decade, just as the war in Iran adds to the gloom in the Nordic nation.

articles.title: Nine in ten Britons back tougher drink-drive laws as Government consultation to reduce legal limit closes next month
articles.excerpt: The Government's Road Safety Strategy consultation closes on 11 May, with ministers garnering feedback on a range of measures designed to reduce traffic deaths in Britain.
articles.content:
Britons are overwhelmingly in support of the Government's proposal to introduce stricter drink-driving laws, according to a new report.
